dialogueLines.text: I don't think that will stop him we need to help Darry run away.
Oh no, I don't remember those gaps being there.  It must have to do with how you altered the timeline.

Hurry Echo!  We need to find a way to close those gaps.  There is another ability you have that I should have mentioned earlier, which is your float ability!  Press A when you are close to the gaps to activate your ability and press A again when you see the slider in the green area to stay in the air.
I think you can uses those crates to fill the gaps enough for Darry to make it across.
